title: ESIC Delhi – Young Professional, Consultants and More – 17 Posts
shortInfo: Employees State Insurance Corporation Delhi (ESIC Delhi) Recruitment 2026 for 17 posts of Young Professional, Consultants Grade-1, Consultants Grade-2 and Senior Consultants. Candidates with Bachelors' or Post Graduate degree, MBA Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 14-05-2026, and closes on 04-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through ESIC Delhi official website esic.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: ESIC Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 17 Young Professional, Consultants and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Corporation Delhi (ESIC Delhi) Recruitment 2026 for 17 posts of Young Professional, Consultants Grade-1, Consultants Grade-2 and Senior Consultants. Candidates with Bachelors' or Post Graduate degree, MBA Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 14-05-2026, and closes on 04-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through ESIC Delhi official website esic.gov.in.

age_limit.age_details: Young Professional: Max 32 years, Consultant Grade-1: Max 45 years, Consultant Grade-2: Max 50 years, Senior Consultant: Max 62 years

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors' or Post Graduate degree in relevant fields, MBA

salary_details.pay_scale: Young Professional: Rs. 70,000; Consultant Grade-1: Rs. 80,000-1,45,000; Consultant Grade-2: Rs. 1,45,000-2,65,000; Senior Consultant: Rs. 2,65,000-3,30,000

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ESIC Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
